CustomField.description:
The name of the consortium member that will be added to the Funding Award when Action_Type is add, and the new name of the consortium member when the Action Type is Name Change
The name of the new consortium member that will be replacing the GRL on GRL change types
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The name of the consortium member that will be added to the Funding Award when Action_Type is add, and the new name of the consortium member when the Action Type is Name Change
The name of the new consortium member that will be replacing the GRL on GRL change types
CustomField.label: New Consortium Member Name
